title: Rich Smoky Italian Rice Lasagna
description: A dense and indulgent Italian dish featuring rice and a smoky flavor, made with rice wine and namul-blanch-seasoned ingredients, suitable for a Buddhist temple gathering.

ingredients.name: Namul
ingredients.notes: seasoned with salt and sesame oil

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the Arborio rice according to package instructions using rice wine instead of water.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat and saute the namul until tender.
In a separate saucepan, combine tomato sauce and garlic, and simmer over low heat.
In a large bowl, combine cooked rice, namul, and tomato sauce mixture, and stir until well combined.
In a 9x13 inch baking dish, create a thin layer of tomato sauce on the bottom.
Arrange a layer of cooked rice mixture on top of the sauce.
Sprinkle a layer of smoked mozzarella cheese over the rice.
Repeat the layers two more times, ending with a layer of cheese on top.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 30 minutes.
Remove the foil and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
